1b:["$","section",null,{"className":"section","id":"temp-repair","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"container repair-layout","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"reveal","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"eyebrow","children":"Before the adjuster comes"}],["$","h2",null,{"className":"section-title","children":"Temporary Repairs for Your Claim"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"lead","children":"Different from a standard repair. After a storm, we get the roof weather-tight while leaving the damage clearly visible — so it's ready for the insurance inspection and you're not taking on more water in the meantime."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"It keeps the damage intact for a fair assessment, stops a bad situation from getting worse, and sets up the application for the larger repair — making the whole claim process easier."}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"repair-list","children":[["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","svg",null,{"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","strokeWidth":"2","strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","children":["$","path",null,{"d":"M20 6L9 17l-5-5"}]}],"Roof made weather-tight after storm damage"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","svg",null,{"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","strokeWidth":"2","strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","children":["$","path",null,{"d":"M20 6L9 17l-5-5"}]}],"Damage left clearly visible for the inspection"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","svg",null,{"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","strokeWidth":"2","strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","children":["$","path",null,{"d":"M20 6L9 17l-5-5"}]}],"Sets up the application for the full repair"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","svg",null,{"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","strokeWidth":"2","strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","children":["$","path",null,{"d":"M20 6L9 17l-5-5"}]}],"Speed first — we use whatever makes it weather-tight fastest, even non-matching shingles or felt, to keep water out of your home"]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"className":"repair-callme","children":["Storm just hit? A weather-tight fix that preserves the damage for your insurance inspection — different from a standard repair. Travel billed separately: $1/km each way plus travel time. On an approved claim, the temporary-repair cost is added to your claim once coverage is confirmed; the full repair is quoted as part of the claim."}]]}]]}]}]
1c:["$","section",null,{"className":"section bg-white","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"container split","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"media-frame reveal","style":{"order":-1},"children":["$","img",null,{"src":"/brand/metstar/web/teak.jpg","alt":"DT Roofing crew working on a Westman roof","loading":"lazy","width":"1400","height":"788"}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"reveal","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"eyebrow","children":"Be sure who you call"}],["$","h2",null,{"className":"section-title","children":"The Opposite of the Storm Chaser"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"lead","children":"After a big storm, out-of-town crews show up, knock on doors, and push you to sign on the spot.
